data.description:
# WU-4 — Forward-compat detection (fsck) + docs + deployment gate

Make the no-dual-write rollout window *visible* instead of silent, and document
the new event + grammar + deployment ordering. Depends on WU-1 (the
`TAG_DELTA` type must exist to reason about). Can run in parallel with WU-2/WU-3.

## What / Scope

- `fsck` / `bridge_fsck` (`src/rebar/_engine/` fsck path): add a generic check
  that WARNS when the store contains event-type files whose type is NOT in the
  running binary's `KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES` ("store contains event types newer than
  this binary understands — upgrade required"). This converts the silent
  old-clone divergence (an un-upgraded reconcile host ignoring `TAG_DELTA` and
  pushing a stale tag set to Jira) into a detectable signal. Generic, not
  TAG_DELTA-specific.
- `docs/event-schema.md`: add a `TAG_DELTA {added[],removed[]}` row; bump the
  documented `SCHEMA_VERSION` 2→3; note this is the first body-changing type
  addition that engages the unknown-type forward-compat path.
- `CLAUDE.md` (tool set / tag commands) + CLI `--help`: document the new
  `--add-tag`/`--remove-tag`/`--set-tags` grammar and the `--set-tags=""`
  "clears OBSERVED tags only" warning.
- Release note / docs: elevate "upgrade reconciler-running clones FIRST" from a
  note to an enforced operational gate for this rollout.

## Delivery / green state

`fsck` flags an unknown-newer event type with an upgrade warning; docs and CLI
help describe the new grammar and rollout ordering. Full suite green.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `fsck`/`bridge_fsck` warns on unknown-newer event-type files present in the
      store (generic; verified with a synthetic future-type event)
- [ ] `docs/event-schema.md` updated (TAG_DELTA row, SCHEMA_VERSION 3, forward-
      compat note)
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` + CLI `--help` document the new tag grammar + `--set-tags=""`
      warning
- [ ] Reconciler-upgrade-first deployment gate documented
- [ ] Test: `fsck` unknown-type warning fires; full suite green
data.title: WU-4 — Forward-compat fsck detection + docs + deployment gate
